raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 436 extends the notice period to terminate tenancy for nonpayment of rent from 3 days to 14 days.",
    "Over two dozen states have 'pay or quit' periods longer than 3 days.",
    "California's eviction laws have not been updated since 1863.",
    "Extending the notice period to 14 days will help renters and landlords avoid unnecessary evictions.",
    "Rent prices are growing 325% faster than incomes in California.",
    "45% of California households are renting.",
    "SB 436 aims to give tenants more time to collect their last paycheck, access rental assistance, or seek legal counsel."
  ]
}
```
